name: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
post_apply_message: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009, non-Steam, cracked/abandonware) — Apply AUTO-ADDS the Steam shortcut (Transformers2.exe, game folder as start dir, a stable computed appid, GE-Proton 10.34). Steam closes briefly to write it; stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner'. Then run it. If you hit missing-DLL errors, install the _Redist files (per Chemical's readme). Optional: PCGW has an Ultrawide Fix + FPS Unlock by killer-m if you want widescreen. No backed-up prefix, so the appid is derived from the recipe id (stable).
notes: Built 2026-07-10 from the SD scan (exe transformers2.exe at root; Chemical crack, readme '_how to run game!!.txt' = 'run Transformers2.exe as admin, install _Redist for DLLs'). Also present: launcher.exe, mc.exe. Not in the gospel registry, so steam_shortcut derives a stable appid from the recipe id. Distinct from transformers-the-game (2007) and twfc (War for Cybertron).
